title: sium tenue
intro: Sium tenue, also known as Water Parsnip or slender water-parsnip, is a perennial plant native to wetland areas in Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions like eczema. The health benefits of Sium tenue include reducing swelling, improving digestion, and aiding in the removal of toxins from the body. Sium tenue is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it can also be consumed raw in salads or as a vegetable.
